elements.title: Siri Dahl
elements.contents: ... that the cisgender actress Siri Dahl (pictured) once won a Trans Erotica Award?

elements.title: Anzac storyline
elements.contents: ... that scenes for Home and Away's Anzac storyline were shot at the Australian War Memorial after budget issues prevented filming in Europe?

elements.title: William Robinson
elements.contents: ... that William Robinson, once deemed the first important architect in London, Ontario, did not call himself an architect until his forties?

elements.title: Nada dan Dakwah
elements.contents: ... that a performer in the Indonesian film Nada dan Dakwah refused a best supporting actor nomination because of his congregation's complaints?

elements.title: Cecile Long Steele
elements.contents: ... that Cecile Long Steele pioneered the broiler chicken industry in the United States after accidentally receiving 500 chickens?

elements.title: Hindu theology
elements.contents: ... that not all schools of Hindu theology believe that reality was created out of nothing?

elements.title: their fourth studio album
elements.contents: ... that the American band Beach House initially rejected an offer to distribute their fourth studio album at Starbucks stores?

elements.title: sangza
elements.contents: ... that deep-fried noodles called sangza are eaten by Uyghur people for Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha?

elements.title: Adam Bernero
elements.contents: ... that Adam Bernero signed his first contract with a Major League Baseball team on a Denny's napkin?
